Hair Color Portfolio

Anthropos

Title: Anthropos

Bio: A civic‑focused project about the post‑COVID housing crisis, featuring data highlights, a petition to elected officials, and an interactive district locator.

Languages used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript

Case study: Built to inform and mobilize action on NYC housing issues with clear stats, a streamlined petition flow, and district‑based outreach tools.

External link: Visit project

Sirius

Title: Sirius

Bio: A space‑focused site that automatically publishes science news using a custom data pipeline and editorial filtering.

Languages used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript

Case study: Built as a visual hub for space exploration with automated science updates, clean storytelling, and a fast, image‑forward layout.

External link: Visit project

Hair Color Portfolio

Title: Hair Color Portfolio

Bio: JosephHuckabee.com is a hair portfolio showcasing signature work and a clean, client‑friendly presentation.

Languages used: HTML, CSS, JavaScript

Case study: Built to present hair artistry with strong visuals and a straightforward path for prospective clients.

External link: Visit project
